title: June 4
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|June|hide31=yes}}
'''June 4''' is the 155th day of the year (156th in leap years), with 210 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1950s#1958|1958]] – [[Josef Rubinstein]] is born.
*[[1960s#1960|1960]] – [[Kristine Kathryn Rusch]] is born.
*[[1960s#1969|1969]] – [[Horatio Sanz]] is born.
*[[1996]] – [[Star Wars Droids: The Kalarba Adventures (TPB)|''Star Wars Droids: The Kalarba Adventures'' limited-edition hardcover collection]] published.
*[[2002]] – [[Star Wars Insider 60|''Star Wars Insider'' 60]] published.
*[[2003]] – [[Republic 54|''Republic'' 54]] published.
*[[2012]] – [[Vivien Lyra Blair]] is born.
*[[2014]] – ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File Part 22]]'' published.
*[[2018]] – ''[[LEGO Star Wars: Great Adventures]]'' published.
*[[2019]] – ''[[C-3PO Does NOT Like Sand!]]'' published.
*2019 – [[Star Wars Adventures: Destroyer Down (TPB)|''Star Wars Adventures: Destroyer Down'' (TPB)]] published.
*[[2021]] – "[[Decommissioned]]" airs on [[Disney+]].
*[[2024]] – ''[[Star Wars: The Acolyte]]'' first two episodes aired on Disney+.
*2024 – ''[[Imperial Commando: 501st]]'' reprinted as part of ''[[The Essential Legends Collection]]''.
*2024 – [[The Lando Calrissian Adventures (omnibus)|''The Lando Calrissian Adventures'']] reprinted as part of ''The Essential Legends Collection''.
*2024 – ''[[X-Wing: Iron Fist]]'' reprinted as part of ''The Essential Legends Collection''.
*2024 – [[X-Wing: Iron Fist (unabridged audiobook)|''X-Wing: Iron Fist'' unabridged audiobook]] released as part of ''The Essential Legends Collection''.
*2024 – ''[[Young Jedi Adventures: Pop-Up Peekaboo!]]'' published.
*[[2025]] – [[Jedi Knights 4|''Jedi Knights'' 4]] published.
*2025 – [[The High Republic – Fear of the Jedi 5|''The High Republic – Fear of the Jedi'' 5]] published.
<noinclude>
